name: The Directorate
desc: The emergency governing body established by Corbin under the Emergency Suppression Protocol. Controls all food, water, medicine, and shelter through the Grid. Employs the Guardian corps and the Eyewyn surveillance network. Opposed by Westhoff, Vilde, and the Caldera resistance.
narration: The emergency government. Controls food. Water. Medicine. Shelter. The air. Your neurochemistry. That's right. Tells you that everything is going to be okay, and waits for you to believe it.

name: The Seiðr
desc: Entities from another dimension who traveled through the Fold along with the Brisinger crew. They exist as consciousness currents and integrate with biological hosts. Not a unified faction — Æzal (colonizer) and Gabræl (conservationist) conflict.
narration: The visitors is what we called them. And it is what they called us. They wear our crew like clothes. They are not united. Neither are we. Æzal wants to spread. Gabræl wants to preserve. They disagree on us politely.

name: Guild of Masons & Order of Magicians
desc: A secret society within the Ivaldi mining crew. Members are Masons (workers) and Magicians (leaders). They maintain a hidden ritual chamber and hold genuine political power on the Plateau.
narration: A brotherhood hiding inside a mining crew. Masons swing the hammers. Magicians read the stars. They have ritual. They have a sarcophagus. They have decided what happens on the Plateau.

name: SMILE
desc: Sovereign Mind Initiative. A humanist organization dedicated to keeping humans human — resisting Seiðr integration. Founded at the Westhoff Institute. Opposes both Corbin's totalitarianism and Seiðr takeover.
narration: Sovereign Mind Initiative. A network of humanists trying to keep humans human. They oppose Corbin's chemistry and the Seiðr's tide in the same breath. They smile because the alternative is to scream.

name: The Caldera Resistance
desc: A community of colonists who have deserted the Directorate regime and established themselves in a hidden volcanic caldera valley.
narration: The deserters. The ones who walked off the colony's payroll and into the jungle. Thieman runs the place. Sarah Farley runs the perimeter. The map says they don't exist. The map is several clicks behind.

name: Orbital Command
desc: The command structure overseeing all orbital assets — the Corridor, Vanguard patrol ships, relay stations, and the haulers. Effectively under Bellamy, who supports Corbin's system for pragmatic reasons.
narration: Bellamy's domain. The Corridor. The patrol craft. The haulers. Officially neutral. In practice — leaning whichever way the Director needs them to lean. She has good wine and bad nights.
